channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Federal judge halts Texas law enabling state arrests and deportations of undocumented immigrants
item.description: A federal judge blocked Texas from enforcing a law that would let state authorities arrest and deport undocumented immigrants without federal involvement.

item.title: House Democrats narrowly lose vote to end Iran war as GOP support ticks up
item.description: House Democrats on Thursday nearly won a vote to end President Trump's war with Iran, though one of their own helped defeat it on a technicality.

item.title: Keeping America Prosperous — Far Beyond 250
item.description: How can we best guarantee that the U.S. will have a lot of future birthdays?
